sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, start_date DATE, end_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, DATE '2023-01-01', DATE '2023-01-31');
SELECT id, date_diff('day', start_date, end_date) AS date_difference FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = DATE '2023-02-15' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_diff('month', start_date, end_date) AS month_difference FROM test_dates;
